name: @umbraculum/ai-tool-sdk
description: Umbraculum AI-tool SDK — the library-agnostic interface every callable tool the AI consultant may invoke must satisfy (AiTool, AiToolScope, AiToolContext, AiToolRegistry, AiToolDefinition). Platform-classified per sub-plan #9 §1.1; published as a peer of @umbraculum/module-sdk per PLATFORM-ARCHITECTURE.md §4.4. Extracted from @umbraculum/contracts on 2026-05-21.
